A

accident() - Method in record class view.CreateDialogs.EditNodeData
Returns the value of the accident record component.
accident() - Method in record class view.CreateDialogs.NodeData
Returns the value of the accident record component.
Accident - Class in model.accident
Represents a medical accident associated with a patient.
Accident() - Constructor for class model.accident.Accident
Creates a default accident.
Accident(AccidentType, String, Patient) - Constructor for class model.accident.Accident
Creates an accident with all main information.
ACCIDENT - Enum constant in enum class model.graph.NodeType
Location where a medical accident requiring intervention has occurred
AccidentType - Enum Class in model.accident
List of medical accident so that the ambulance driver is aware of the purpose of the intervention.
addAgent(Agent) - Method in class model.graph.Edge
Adds an agent to this edge if it is not already present.
addAgent(Agent) - Method in class model.graph.Node
Adds an agent to this node if it is not already present.
addAgent(Agent) - Method in class simulation.SimulationEngine
Adds an agent to the simulation.
addAgentBtn - Variable in class view.ToolBox
 
addEdge(Edge) - Method in class model.graph.Graph
Adds an edge to the graph.
addEdgeBtn - Variable in class view.ToolBox
 
addNode(Node) - Method in class model.graph.Graph
Adds a node to the graph if it is not already present.
addNodeBtn - Variable in class view.ToolBox
 
addRandomAgents(SimulationEngine) - Method in class controller.GraphController
Adds random agents to test the simulation with more traffic and congestion.
addRandomAgentsBtn - Variable in class view.ToolBox
 
addRandomBtn - Variable in class view.ToolBox
 
addRandomNodes(SimulationEngine) - Method in class controller.GraphController
Adds random nodes to quickly build a larger graph for testing.
Agent - Class in model.agent
Represents an agent moving through the graph.
Agent(int, double, Node, Node) - Constructor for class model.agent.Agent
Creates a new agent.
AgentData(int, AgentType, double, PathFinderType) - Constructor for record class view.CreateDialogs.AgentData
Creates an instance of a AgentData record class.
AgentFactory - Class in controller
Factory for creating agents by type.
AgentFactory() - Constructor for class controller.AgentFactory
 
AgentType - Enum Class in model.agent
Defines the available types of agents in the simulation.
algo() - Method in record class view.CreateDialogs.AgentData
Returns the value of the algo record component.
ArrivalBehavior - Enum Class in simulation
Defines what happens when an agent reaches its destination.
arrivalBehaviorBox - Variable in class view.SimulationBar
Lets the user choose how agents behave after reaching their destination
ARRIVED - Enum constant in enum class model.agent.State
Agent has reached its destination
ASTAR - Enum constant in enum class pathfinding.PathFinderType
 
AStarPathFinder - Class in pathfinding
Implementation of the A* pathfinding algorithm.
AStarPathFinder(Graph) - Constructor for class pathfinding.AStarPathFinder
 
attachView(GraphView) - Method in class controller.GraphController
Attaches the view to the controller.

B

blocked() - Method in record class view.CreateDialogs.EditNodeData
Returns the value of the blocked record component.
buildEngine(Graph, Node, Node) - Static method in class controller.SimulationController
Builds and returns a configured simulation engine.
buildExampleGraph() - Static method in class controller.GraphController
Builds and returns a pre-configured graph with nodes and edges.

C

capacity() - Method in record class view.CreateDialogs.EdgeData
Returns the value of the capacity record component.
CARGO - Enum constant in enum class model.agent.AgentType
Agent carrying cargo; speed is reduced proportionally to the load weight
CargoAgent - Class in model.agent
Agent carrying cargo whose weight reduces its movement speed.
CargoAgent(int, Node, Node, double) - Constructor for class model.agent.CargoAgent
Creates a cargo agent with the given load weight.
clear() - Method in class model.graph.Graph
Removes all nodes and edges from the graph.
clear() - Method in class view.PatientPanel
Clears the panel and displays a default message.
clear() - Method in class view.StatsPanel
Shows the general graph overview when nothing is selected.
clearAgents() - Method in class simulation.SimulationEngine
Removes all agents from the simulation and resets the simulation tick.
clearGraph() - Method in class controller.GraphController
Clears the graph completely so the user can start a new simulation.
clearGraphBtn - Variable in class view.ToolBox
 
clearSelection() - Method in class view.GraphView
Clears the current selection (node or edge).
CONGESTION_AWARE - Enum constant in enum class pathfinding.PathFinderType
 
CongestionAwarePathFinder - Class in pathfinding
A pathfinder that takes edge congestion into account.
CongestionAwarePathFinder(Graph) - Constructor for class pathfinding.CongestionAwarePathFinder
 
containsAgent(Agent) - Method in class model.graph.Edge
Checks whether the given agent is currently on this edge.
containsAgent(Agent) - Method in class model.graph.Node
Returns whether the given agent is on this node.
controller - package controller
 
count() - Method in record class view.CreateDialogs.RandomAgentsData
Returns the value of the count record component.
create(AgentType, int, Node, Node) - Static method in class controller.AgentFactory
Creates an agent of the specified type using default parameters.
create(AgentType, int, Node, Node, double) - Static method in class controller.AgentFactory
Creates an agent of the specified type with a custom numeric parameter.
create(PathFinderType, Graph) - Static method in class controller.PathFinderFactory
Creates the routing algorithm selected by the user.
createAgentAtSelectedNode(SimulationEngine) - Method in class controller.GraphController
Creates an agent on the currently selected node and assigns a destination, speed and pathfinding algorithm.
CreateDialogs - Class in view
Contains creation dialogs used by the application.
CreateDialogs() - Constructor for class view.CreateDialogs
 
CreateDialogs.AgentData - Record Class in view
Data returned by the agent creation dialog.
CreateDialogs.EdgeData - Record Class in view
Data returned by the edge creation dialog.
CreateDialogs.EditNodeData - Record Class in view
Data returned by the node edit dialog.
CreateDialogs.NodeData - Record Class in view
Data returned by the node creation dialog.
CreateDialogs.RandomAgentsData - Record Class in view
Data returned by the random agents dialog.

deleteBtn - Variable in class view.ToolBox
 
deleteSelected() - Method in class controller.GraphController
Deletes the selected element so the user can modify the graph interactively.
destinationId() - Method in record class view.CreateDialogs.AgentData
Returns the value of the destinationId record component.
DIJKSTRA - Enum constant in enum class pathfinding.PathFinderType
 
DijkstraPathFinder - Class in pathfinding
Implementation of the PathFinder interface using Dijkstra's algorithm.
DijkstraPathFinder(Graph) - Constructor for class pathfinding.DijkstraPathFinder
Creates a new Dijkstra path finder operating on a graph.
DIRT_ROAD - Enum constant in enum class model.graph.EdgeType
Slower road (representing difficult terrain)
disableAllModes() - Method in class controller.GraphController
Cancels all interaction modes to return the interface to normal selection mode.
disableDeleteMode() - Method in class controller.GraphController
Disables deletion mode and restores the normal cursor.
disableEdgeCreationMode() - Method in class controller.GraphController
Disables edge creation mode and restores the normal cursor.
disableNodeCreationMode() - Method in class controller.GraphController
Disables node creation mode and restores the normal cursor.

Represents a directed or undirected connection between two nodes in the graph.

EdgeType - Enum Class in model.graph
Defines the different road categories available in the simulation.
editBtn - Variable in class view.ToolBox

editSelected() - Method in class controller.GraphController
Opens the correct edit workflow depending on the selected element.
enableDeleteMode() - Method in class controller.GraphController
Enables deletion mode.
enableEdgeCreationMode() - Method in class controller.GraphController
Enables edge creation mode.
enableNodeCreationMode() - Method in class controller.GraphController
Enables node creation mode.

Checks equality based on agent id.
equals(Object) - Method in class model.graph.Node

Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.

F

FAST - Enum constant in enum class model.agent.AgentType
Agent moving at twice the normal speed (2.0)
FastAgent - Class in model.agent
A faster variant of the standard Agent.
FastAgent(int, double, Node, Node) - Constructor for class model.agent.FastAgent
Alternative constructor with custom speed multiplier.
FastAgent(int, Node, Node) - Constructor for class model.agent.FastAgent
Creates a fast agent with increased speed.
findPath(Node, Node) - Method in class pathfinding.AStarPathFinder
 
findPath(Node, Node) - Method in class pathfinding.CongestionAwarePathFinder
Computes the best route between two nodes while considering road types and congestion.
findPath(Node, Node) - Method in class pathfinding.DijkstraPathFinder
Computes the shortest path between two nodes using Dijkstra's algorithm.
findPath(Node, Node) - Method in interface pathfinding.IPathFinder
Computes a path between two nodes.

G

getAccident() - Method in class model.graph.Node
Returns the accident associated with this node.
getAge() - Method in class model.accident.Patient
Returns the patient's age used to describe the emergency situation.
getAgents() - Method in class model.graph.Edge
Returns the list of agents currently on this edge.
getAgents() - Method in class simulation.SimulationEngine
Returns all agents currently managed by the simulation.
getAgentType() - Method in class model.agent.Agent
Returns the type of this agent.
getAllAgents() - Method in class model.graph.Node
Returns the list of all agents currently on this node.
getAllEdges() - Method in class model.graph.Graph
Returns all edges in the graph.
getAllNodes() - Method in class model.graph.Graph
Returns all nodes currently contained in the graph.
getAveragePassedSpeed() - Method in class model.graph.Edge
Returns the average speed of agents that completed this edge.
getAveragePassedSpeed() - Method in class model.graph.Node
Returns the average speed of agents that passed through this node.
getBodyTemperature() - Method in class model.accident.Patient
Returns the patient's body temperature.
getBpm() - Method in class model.accident.Patient
Returns the patient's heart rate.
getCapacity() - Method in class model.graph.Edge
Returns the maximum capacity of the edge.
getCargoWeight() - Method in class model.agent.CargoAgent
Returns the cargo weight carried by this agent.
getCondition() - Method in class model.accident.Patient
Returns the patient's medical condition displayed in the interface.
getCongestionWaitCycles() - Method in class model.graph.Node
Returns how many ticks this element has waited because of congestion.
getCurrentEffectiveDistance() - Method in class model.agent.Agent
Returns the effective distance of the edge currently used by the agent.
getCurrentPath() - Method in class model.agent.Agent
Returns the current path followed by the agent.
getCurrentPosition() - Method in class model.agent.Agent
Returns the current position node of the agent.
getCurrentTick() - Method in class simulation.SimulationEngine
Returns the current simulation tick.
getDescription() - Method in class model.accident.Accident
Returns the accident description.
getDestination() - Method in class model.agent.Agent
Returns the destination node of the agent.
getDestination() - Method in class model.graph.Edge
Returns the destination node of the edge.
getDisplayName() - Method in enum class model.accident.AccidentType
Returns the readable name of the accident type.
getDistance() - Method in class model.graph.Edge
Returns the distance of the edge.
getEdges(Node) - Method in class model.graph.Graph
Returns all outgoing edges of a node.
getGraph() - Method in class simulation.SimulationEngine
Returns the graph associated with the simulation.
getId() - Method in class model.agent.Agent
Returns the unique identifier of the agent.
getId() - Method in class model.graph.Node
Returns the node identifier.
getInitialPosition() - Method in class model.agent.Agent
Returns the initial position of the agent.
getMaxCapacity() - Method in class model.graph.Node
Returns the maximum capacity of the node.
getName() - Method in class model.accident.Patient
Return the patient's name used in the accident information panel.
getName() - Method in class model.graph.Node
Returns the display name used to identify the node in the interface.
getNeighbors(Node) - Method in class model.graph.Graph
Returns all neighboring nodes reachable from a given node.
getNextNode() - Method in class model.agent.Agent
Returns the next node the agent is heading to.
getNodeById(int) - Method in class model.graph.Graph
Finds a node from its identifier.
getNodeWaitCycles() - Method in class model.agent.Agent
Returns how many ticks the agent has waited on a congested node.
getNoPriorityAgents() - Method in class model.graph.Node
Returns the list of no-priority agents currently located on this node.
getPassCount() - Method in class model.graph.Edge
Returns how many agents have completed this edge.
getPassCount() - Method in class model.graph.Node
Returns the number of passes through this node.
getPathFinder() - Method in class model.agent.Agent
 
getPathIndex() - Method in class model.agent.Agent
Returns the current index in the path.
getPatient() - Method in class model.accident.Accident
Returns the patient involved in the accident.
getPriorityAgents() - Method in class model.graph.Node
Returns the list of priority agents currently located on this node.
getPriorityLevel() - Method in class model.agent.PriorityAgent
Returns the priority level of this agent.
getProgressOnEdge() - Method in class model.agent.Agent
Returns the progress of the agent on the current edge.
getSelectedAgent() - Method in class controller.GraphController
Returns the currently selected agent.
getSelectedEdge() - Method in class controller.GraphController
Returns the currently selected edge.
getSelectedNode() - Method in class controller.GraphController
Returns the currently selected node.
getSource() - Method in class model.graph.Edge
Returns the source node of the edge.
getSpeed() - Method in class model.agent.Agent
Returns the maximum movement speed of the agent.
getState() - Method in class model.agent.Agent
Returns the current state of the agent.
getType() - Method in class model.accident.Accident
Returns the accident type.
getType() - Method in class model.agent.CargoAgent
Returns the type of this agent.
getType() - Method in class model.agent.NormalAgent
Returns the type of this agent.
getType() - Method in class model.agent.PriorityAgent
Returns the type of this agent.
getType() - Method in class model.agent.SlowAgent
Returns the type of this agent.
getType() - Method in class model.graph.Edge
Returns the road type of this edge.
getType() - Method in class model.graph.Node
Returns the role of the node in the simulation.
getX() - Method in class model.graph.Node
Returns the X coordinate of the node.
getY() - Method in class model.graph.Node
Returns the Y coordinate of the node.
Graph - Class in model.graph
Represents a graph using an adjacency list structure.
Graph() - Constructor for class model.graph.Graph
Creates an empty graph.
GraphController - Class in controller
Controller responsible for building and configuring the graph.
GraphController(Graph) - Constructor for class controller.GraphController
Creates a controller bound to a graph instance.
GraphStorageManager - Class in io
Utility class responsible for saving and loading the simulation state using binary serialization.

GraphView - Class in view
Visual representation of the graph used by the simulation.
GraphView() - Constructor for class view.GraphView
Creates the view and prepares background click handling.

H

handleAgentClicked(Agent) - Method in class controller.GraphController
Handles a click on an agent in the graph view.
handleBackgroundClick(Point2D) - Method in class controller.GraphController
Handles a click on the empty drawing area and creates a new node.
handleEdgeClicked(Edge) - Method in class controller.GraphController
Handles a click on an edge and removes it when deletion mode is active.
handleNodeClicked(Node) - Method in class controller.GraphController
Handles a node click to manipulate the graph.
hasConnection(Node, Node) - Method in class model.graph.Graph
Checks whether two nodes are already connected in either direction.
hasEdge(Node, Node) - Method in class model.graph.Graph
Checks whether a directed edge already exists from source to destination.

Returns a hash code based on agent id.
hashCode() - Method in class model.graph.Node

HOME_ACCIDENT - Enum constant in enum class model.accident.AccidentType
 
HOSPITAL - Enum constant in enum class model.graph.NodeType

I

io - package io
 
IPathFinder - Interface in pathfinding
Defines a pathfinding strategy capable of computing a path between two nodes.

Returns whether the node is blocked.
isConscious() - Method in class model.accident.Patient
Indicates whether the patient is conscious.
isHeavilyCongested() - Method in class model.graph.Node
Returns true if this node is currently in heavy congestion mode.
isOriented() - Method in class model.graph.Edge
Returns whether the edge is directed.

pauseBtn - Variable in class view.SimulationBar
 
POINT_OF_INTEREST - Enum constant in enum class model.graph.NodeType
Standard location with no specific medical role
PRIORITY - Enum constant in enum class model.agent.AgentType
High-priority agent whose speed scales with its priority level
PriorityAgent - Class in model.agent
High-priority agent whose movement speed scales with its priority level.

R

RANDOM_DESTINATION - Enum constant in enum class simulation.ArrivalBehavior
Assigns a new random destination and continues the simulation

Creates an instance of a RandomAgentsData record class.
registerPass(double) - Method in class model.graph.Edge
Registers that an agent has completed this edge.
registerPass(double) - Method in class model.graph.Node
Registers a pass through this node with the given speed.
REMOVE - Enum constant in enum class simulation.ArrivalBehavior
Removes the agent from the simulation
removeAgent(Agent) - Method in class model.graph.Edge
Removes an agent from this edge.
removeAgent(Agent) - Method in class model.graph.Node
Removes an agent from this node.
removeAgent(Agent) - Method in class simulation.SimulationEngine
Removes an agent from the simulation entirely.
removeEdge(Node, Node) - Method in class model.graph.Graph
Removes an edge between the source node and the destination node.
removeNode(Node) - Method in class model.graph.Graph
Removes a node from the graph and deletes all edges connected to it.
renderAgents(List<Agent>) - Method in class view.GraphView
Updates the list of agents displayed on the graph (without rebuilding the graph).
renderGraph(Graph) - Method in class view.GraphView
Renders the graph by drawing nodes, edges, and labels.
replaceWith(Graph) - Method in class model.graph.Graph
Replaces the current graph data with another graph.
reset() - Method in class simulation.SimulationEngine
Resets the simulation to its initial state.
resetBtn - Variable in class view.SimulationBar
 
resetPassStats() - Method in class model.graph.Edge
Resets traffic statistics collected on this edge.
resetPassStats() - Method in class model.graph.Node
Resets pass statistics for this node.
restoreSimulation(String) - Static method in class io.GraphStorageManager
Loads a simulation state from a binary file.
ROAD - Enum constant in enum class model.graph.EdgeType
Standard road with normal travel conditions

saveBtn - Variable in class view.ToolBox
 
saveSimulation(Graph, List<Agent>, String) - Static method in class io.GraphStorageManager
Saves the graph and the agents into a binary file.

setAccident(Accident) - Method in class model.graph.Node
Links an accident to this node.
setAge(int) - Method in class model.accident.Patient
Sets the patient's age.
setAgentClickHandler(Consumer<Agent>) - Method in class view.GraphView
Sets the callback invoked when an agent is clicked on the graph.
setAgents(List<Agent>) - Method in class model.graph.Edge
Sets the list of agents currently on this edge.
setAgentType(AgentType) - Method in class model.agent.Agent
Sets the type of this agent.
setArrivalBehavior(ArrivalBehavior) - Method in class simulation.SimulationEngine
Defines what should happen when an agent reaches its destination.
setBackgroundClickHandler(Consumer<Point2D>) - Method in class view.GraphView
Sets the handler used when the user clicks on empty space.
setBlocked(boolean) - Method in class model.graph.Node
Sets whether the node is blocked.
setBodyTemperature(double) - Method in class model.accident.Patient
Updates the patient's body temperature while keeping it in a realistic range.
setBpm(int) - Method in class model.accident.Patient
Updates the patient's heart rate while keeping it in a realistic range.
setCapacity(int) - Method in class model.graph.Edge
Sets the maximum capacity of the edge.
setCargoWeight(double) - Method in class model.agent.CargoAgent
Updates the cargo weight and recomputes the movement speed accordingly.
setCondition(String) - Method in class model.accident.Patient
Sets the patient's medical condition.
setCongestionWaitCycles(int) - Method in class model.graph.Node
Updates the waiting time caused by congestion.
setConscious(boolean) - Method in class model.accident.Patient
Updates the patient's consciousness state.

Sets the effective distance of the current edge.
setCurrentPath(List<Node>) - Method in class model.agent.Agent
Sets the current path followed by the agent.
setCurrentPosition(Node) - Method in class model.agent.Agent
Sets the current position node of the agent.
setDefaultPathFinder(IPathFinder) - Method in class simulation.SimulationEngine
Sets the default routing algorithm used by agents without a custom pathfinder.

Sets the cursor used while deletion mode is active.
setDescription(String) - Method in class model.accident.Accident
Sets the accident description.

Sets the distance of the edge.

Sets the callback called when an edge is clicked.

setGraph(Graph) - Method in class view.GraphView

Sets the unique identifier of the agent.
setInitialPosition(Node) - Method in class model.agent.Agent

Sets the progress of the agent on the current edge.
setSelectedAgent(Agent) - Method in class view.GraphView
Highlights the selected agent with a red stroke.
setSelectedEdge(Edge) - Method in class view.GraphView
Updates the selected edge and refreshes the visual highlight.
setSelectedNode(Node) - Method in class view.GraphView
Updates the selected node and refreshes the visual highlight.
setSource(Node) - Method in class model.graph.Edge
Sets the source node of the edge.
setSpeed(double) - Method in class model.agent.Agent
Sets the maximum movement speed of the agent.
setState(State) - Method in class model.agent.Agent
Sets the current state of the agent.
setType(AccidentType) - Method in class model.accident.Accident
Sets the accident type.
setType(EdgeType) - Method in class model.graph.Edge
Sets the road type of this edge.
setType(NodeType) - Method in class model.graph.Node
Sets the role of the node in the simulation.
setX(Double) - Method in class model.graph.Node
Sets the X coordinate of the node.
setY(Double) - Method in class model.graph.Node
Sets the Y coordinate of the node.
show() - Static method in class view.HelpDialog
Shows the help window.
showAccident(Accident) - Method in class view.PatientPanel
Displays accident and patient information.
showAgent(Agent) - Method in class view.StatsPanel
Displays statistics for an agent.
showAgentDialog(Set<Integer>) - Static method in class view.CreateDialogs
Displays a dialog to create a new agent.
showEdge(Edge) - Method in class view.StatsPanel
Displays statistics for an edge.
showEdgeDialog() - Static method in class view.CreateDialogs
Displays a dialog to create a new edge.
showEditNodeDialog(Node) - Static method in class view.CreateDialogs
Displays a dialog to edit an existing node.
showGraphOverview(Graph, int) - Method in class view.StatsPanel
Displays general information about the whole graph.
showNode(Node, Graph) - Method in class view.StatsPanel
Displays statistics for a node.
showNodeDialog() - Static method in class view.CreateDialogs
Shows the node creation dialog.
showRandomAgentsDialog() - Static method in class view.CreateDialogs
Displays a dialog to create random agents.
simulation - package simulation
 
SimulationBar - Class in view
Bottom control bar for simulation playback.
SimulationBar() - Constructor for class view.SimulationBar
Builds the simulation controls and keeps them visually grouped so the user can manage the simulation from one place.
SimulationController - Class in controller
Controller responsible for building and configuring the simulation engine.
SimulationController() - Constructor for class controller.SimulationController
 
SimulationEngine - Class in simulation
Manages the execution of the simulation.
SimulationEngine(Graph, IPathFinder) - Constructor for class simulation.SimulationEngine
Creates a new simulation engine.
SLOW - Enum constant in enum class model.agent.AgentType
Agent moving at half the normal speed (0.5)
SlowAgent - Class in model.agent
Agent that moves at half the normal speed (0.5).
SlowAgent(int, Node, Node) - Constructor for class model.agent.SlowAgent
Creates a slow agent with speed 0.5.
speed() - Method in record class view.CreateDialogs.AgentData
Returns the value of the speed record component.
speedLabel - Variable in class view.SimulationBar
 
speedSlider - Variable in class view.SimulationBar
 
SPORTS_ACCIDENT - Enum constant in enum class model.accident.AccidentType
 
start(Stage) - Method in class view.MainApp
Initializes and displays the main application window.
startBtn - Variable in class view.SimulationBar
 
State - Enum Class in model.agent
Represents the possible states of an agent.
StatsPanel - Class in view
Right-side dashboard showing statistics about the selected graph element.
StatsPanel() - Constructor for class view.StatsPanel
Creates an empty stats panel.

T

tick() - Method in class simulation.SimulationEngine
Advances the simulation by one tick.
tickLabel - Variable in class view.SimulationBar
 
ToolBox - Class in view
Toolbar for graph editing and agent management actions.
ToolBox() - Constructor for class view.ToolBox
 
toString() - Method in enum class model.accident.AccidentType
Returns the readable name when the enum is displayed as text.
toString() - Method in class model.agent.Agent
Returns a string representation of the agent.
